title: then use json-render to render a todo app interface for you 😊

content.summary: then use json-render to render a todo app interface for you 😊 Thomas Ricouard (@Dimillian) Here is a little trick: I don't use a TODO app. I use a pinned Codex thread for my long-running TODO. The initial system prompt is to create a master TODO.md and keep it updated with items added by date, etc. It's natural intelligence for my tasks, and it's been very useful so far. — https://nitter.net/Dimillian/status/2036494444799656095#m

Post title: then use json-render to render a todo app interface for you 😊

Post summary: then use json-render to render a todo app interface for you 😊 Thomas Ricouard (@Dimillian) Here is a little trick: I don't use a TODO app. I use a pinned Codex thread for my long-running TODO. The initial system prompt is to create a master TODO.md and keep it updated with items added by date, etc. It's natural intelligence for my tasks, and it's been very useful so far. — https://nitter.net/Dimillian/status/2036494444799656095#m
